data.title: USDC surpasses Tether with $1.8T in transfer volume, marking a record high. In Feb, it accounted for 70% of total volume.
data.description: In February, the monthly transaction volume of stablecoins hit a historic high of $1.8 trillion. Analysts were taken aback by the dominance of USDC, which accounted for 70% of the total volume.

data.title: MATIC price may hit $0.45-$0.52 in late March, currently at $0.38 with possible 18-39% upside if key resistances break.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon (MATIC) is currently trading at $0.38, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) showing a neutral position. There is a potential for a 18-39% increase, reaching a range of $0.45 to $0.52 if it manages to break through key resistance levels in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: By April 2026, SOL price predicted to recover to $110-135 range. Short-term target $87-89, critical support $81-83.
data.description: Summary of SOL Price Predictions: In the short term, the target price for SOL within a week is estimated to be between $87 and $89. Looking ahead to the medium term, predictions suggest the price could reach the range of $95 to $110 within one month. A bullish breakout is anticipated at $135, while the critical support level stands at $81 to $83.

data.title: DOGE's forecast sets price at $0.095-$0.11 by April with neutral RSI and bearish MACD signals.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Dogecoin is currently valued at $0.09, with indicators showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum. Analysis indicates that Dogecoin could potentially rise to a range of $0.095 to $0.11 in the coming weeks if it manages to surpass crucial resistance levels.

data.title: UMIP Introduces the Persistent Infrastructure Identity Framework as a Foundational Digital Layer for the Global Built Environment
data.description: A recent study conducted by UMIP Inc. highlights the issue of the Infrastructure Identity Gap and introduces the concept of Persistent Infrastructure Identity as a potential remedy for ensuring seamless lifecycle consistency within infrastructure networks. The research was carried out by UMIP Inc., a company based in Dallas. The study sheds light on the challenges faced by infrastructure systems and suggests a structural solution to address them effectively. The findings were unveiled in DALLAS on March 7, 2026, according to a press release from PRNewswire.

data.title: Global Times: Understanding 'people' at the heart of Healthy China
data.description: By 2035, a strategic choice has been made by the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China (CPC) to establish a healthier China. During an event in Beijing on March 7, 2026, Xi Jinping, the General Secretary of the CPC Central Committee, interacted with the Chinese Peasants and emphasized the importance of this initiative. It aims to improve the overall well-being of the nation, with a focus on the health and wellness of the population. This decision underscores the commitment to promoting a healthier lifestyle and ensuring the welfare of the citizens.

data.title: ADA price aims for $0.31 with strong technical signals. Currently at $0.26, potential recovery expected next week.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cardano (ADA) is currently trading at $0.26, following a test of a significant support level. Technical analysis indicates a possible increase in value towards $0.31 in the upcoming week, with crucial price levels influencing its trajectory.

data.title: XRP currently trades at $1.37, aiming for $1.50 recovery by late March 2026. Resistance at $1.43, with bulls eyeing $1.40 pivot level.
data.description: The cryptocurrency XRP is currently being traded at a value of $1.37 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 42.79. It is encountering resistance at the $1.43 mark. Analysis of its technical aspects indicates a possible increase to $1.50 if buyers are able to regain the pivotal level of $1.40.

data.title: BNB to hit $667-670 by late March 2026, trading at $627.82 with RSI 44.30. Bears watch $614 support amid breakout potential.
data.description: The current trading price of BNB stands at $627.82, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at a neutral level of 44.30. Technical analysis suggests a possible breakout in the range of $667-670. However, in case momentum weakens, bears are focused on the $614 support level.

data.title: Best Stylish Sunglasses for Women (2026): Quay Selected for Fashion-Forward Frames by Consumer365
data.description: An article released by Consumer365 on March 7, 2026, delves into the world of stylish sunglasses for women. The piece sheds light on Quay, a brand renowned for blending fashionable design with functional eyewear norms. The article dissects prevalent fashion trends, emphasizing the appeal of Quay's offerings.
Scott A Kupor has revealed new stock transactions involving IOT and OMDA.

data.title: Ethereum faces critical $2,000 support test amid bearish trend. $1,984 currently, $1,850 downside risk, bulls target $2,116 breakout.
data.description: The price of Ethereum is currently at $1,984, showing signs of bearish momentum gaining strength. Analysis suggests a potential downside risk reaching $1,850, while optimistic traders are targeting a breakout level of $2,116.

data.title: Bitcoin hovering around $67K support may jump to $75K; indicators hint at bullish trend despite recent dip.
data.description: Bitcoin is showing signs of a possible recovery towards the $75,000 resistance level based on technical indicators, even though there has been a recent downward trend. The cryptocurrency is holding above key support levels. The short-term price prediction for BTC is optimistic.

data.title: xAI's Grok receives huge attention for delivering profanity-laced roasts of Musk, Netanyahu, and Starmer on X platform.
data.description: xAI's artificial intelligence program, Grok, garnered significant interest on social media platform X for delivering scathing insults towards prominent figures Elon Musk, Benjamin Netanyahu, and Keir Starmer at the request of users. The vulgar roasts received widespread attention and sparked conversations online.

data.title: AI Meets Traditional Culture: Huangshan Captures Widespread Attention at ITB Berlin
data.description: In Berlin, Huangshan attracted considerable interest at the latest ITB event by showcasing a unique blend of traditional Chinese heritage and advanced AI technology.

data.title: Latest update (v1.110) of GitHub Copilot for VS Code introduces agent plugins, browser tools, & shared memory for coding.
data.description: The most recent update from GitHub for VS Code includes the incorporation of agent plugins and browser automation tools, alongside the implementation of shared memory capabilities across Copilot products. This update aims to enhance the functionality of the coding platform for more intricate workflows.

data.title: GitHub Copilot now syncs in both directions with Figma design files with a Figma MCP server update, allowing VS Code users to push rendered UIs back to Figma as editable frames.
data.description: The recent update to the Figma MCP server now permits Visual Studio Code users to send finalized user interfaces back to Figma as editable frames, forming a comprehensive bi-directional design-code process. This enhancement streamlines collaboration and ensures seamless integration between design and development teams. This update marks a significant milestone, benefiting a large number of users who actively engage with design and development tools.

data.title: Superteam Wheels Enters Three-Year Strategic Partnership with GCN Italia, Further Expanding European Market Presence
data.description: On March 7, 2026, in Milan, Superteam Wheels, a prominent Chinese producer of carbon fiber bicycle wheelsets, revealed a significant strategic collaboration lasting three years with GCN Italia, the Italian arm of the renowned cycling platform Global Cycling Network (GCN).

data.title: What To Know About Google CEO Sundar Pichai's New $692 Million Equity Pay Package
data.description: Alphabet Inc. has granted its CEO, Sundar Pichai, a fresh equity pay deal that ties a substantial part of his compensation to the success of the company's autonomous driving and drone delivery services, Waymo and Wing Aviation. This new three-year equity plan has the potential to reach up to $692 million if Pichai fulfills the set performance objectives as per the board's standards. The updated compensation structure is similar to the CEO's award for 2022. Pichai's incentive now includes performance-based units associated with Waymo and Wing, valued at around $175 million, which will be distributed based on the performance of these divisions. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Canada's first tokenized bond issued in pilot with central bank & financial institutions to test distributed ledger tech for bond processes.
data.description: A recent pilot project conducted by key financial institutions in collaboration with the central bank aimed to assess the use of distributed ledger technology in improving efficiency in bond issuance, trading, and settlement processes. The study involved testing the infrastructure to determine its effectiveness in facilitating these operations. This undertaking signifies a significant step towards potential advancements in the financial sector, showcasing the industry's willingness to explore innovative solutions.
